platform: custom tube (no Cloudflare, no JSON-LD, Open Graph + HTML parsing)

metadata_mapping.date: og:video:release_date meta property (ISO-8601, split on T, take [0])
metadata_mapping.performers: NOT AVAILABLE — uploader is a community user, not a performer
metadata_mapping.tags: <a href='/video/tag/{tag}/'> anchor text; fallback: meta name=keywords

search_strategy.notes: No auth or CF needed. Each scene appears twice in HTML; deduplicate by video_id. First result is usually best match.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: No reliable URL reconstruction without live search.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: No Cloudflare challenge on any tested page.
No JSON-LD anywhere — parse OG meta + HTML DOM only.
Model pages at /models/ require login; individual model slugs not discoverable from scene pages.
known_limitations: No performer metadata on scene pages.
The 'From:' uploader link (/users/{username}/) is a community account — do not use as performer.
Model pages are login-gated — performerByURL not implementable.
Date in visible HTML is relative ('5 years ago') — use og:video:release_date.
og:image thumbnail is 300x226px — no public full-res alternative.
